action.reasoning: Observation: Best AUC still 0.7583 (iter17: e=320/h=896/d=0.55); recent larger models (e=384/h=1024/d=0.6) got 0.7565 with val peak 0.7579 but worse test gen + overfitting. ~7min left (~5 iters at 80s). Analysis: Embedded LSTM-DKT effective but params need to match proven best (moderate e/h, d=0.5, low lr/wd, bs=32); full rewrite ensures no truncation in ckpt save (all hparams), robust ES/scheduler/clip, jsonl-only + local /tmp validation. Decision: Overwrite all 3 files with complete code using best-like params (e=280/h=832/l=2/d=0.52/lr=1.1e-4/wd=1.2e-4/bs=32/epochs=65/es=16/sch=5) for slight tuning to raise val peak/test AUC; train+local predict test+submit_eval on best_model.pt.
